Name: Lens Simulation
Description: Physically-inspired post-processing system that simulates real camera lens behavior, including depth of field, focus falloff, bokeh, motion blur, and circle of confusion to mimic optical imaging characteristics.

Fields.Name: Near End
Fields.Description: Defines the far boundary of the near-depth range where objects begin transitioning into blur due to proximity to the camera focus plane.

Fields.Name: Near Start
Fields.Description: Defines the start of the near-depth blur region, marking where foreground defocus begins relative to the focal distance.

Fields.Name: Far Start
Fields.Description: Defines the start of far-depth blur, where distant objects begin losing sharpness due to depth of field falloff.

Fields.Name: Far End
Fields.Description: Defines the farthest depth at which maximum blur is applied, representing full defocus in distant background regions.

Fields.Name: Focus Distance
Fields.Description: Primary focal plane distance from the camera where rendered objects appear sharpest with minimal depth of field blur.

Fields.Name: Camera Focus Offset
Fields.Description: Adjusts the focus plane relative to the camera position, allowing fine-tuning of focal depth without changing scene geometry.

Fields.Name: Use Camera Focus
Fields.Description: Enables automatic focus tracking based on camera parameters or target objects instead of fixed focus distance.

Fields.Name: Circle of Confusion: Blur Count
Fields.Description: Number of samples used to approximate circle of confusion blur, affecting quality and smoothness of depth of field.

Fields.Name: F-Number
Fields.Description: Aperture f-number controlling lens opening size; lower values produce stronger depth of field and more pronounced bokeh.

Fields.Name: Aperture Value
Fields.Description: Logarithmic aperture setting used in exposure and depth of field calculations, influencing blur intensity and light intake.

Fields.Name: Film Size
Fields.Description: Simulated sensor or film size in millimeters, affecting field of view and depth of field characteristics.

Fields.Name: Circle of Confusion: Near Factor
Fields.Description: Scaling factor that adjusts blur intensity for objects closer than the focal plane, controlling near-field defocus behavior.

Fields.Name: Circle of Confusion: Far Factor
Fields.Description: Scaling factor for far-field blur intensity, influencing how strongly distant objects are defocused.

Fields.Name: Circle of Confusion: Mode
Fields.Description: Selects computation method for circle of confusion, controlling how depth-based blur radius is derived and applied.

Fields.Name: Skybox Bokeh Rate
Fields.Description: Controls how much the skybox participates in bokeh rendering, affecting blurred highlights in sky or distant environment.

Fields.Name: CMB Intensity
Fields.Description: Intensity of camera motion blur or cinematic motion effect blending, enhancing perceived motion smoothness.

Fields.Name: CMB Active Rotation Speed
Fields.Description: Speed of rotational contribution to motion blur, simulating camera spin or angular movement smear.

Fields.Name: CMB Active Movement Speed
Fields.Description: Speed-based contribution of translational motion blur during active camera movement.

Fields.Name: CMB Detection Time
Fields.Description: Time threshold used to detect motion before applying blur, preventing abrupt or short-lived blur artifacts.

Fields.Name: Sniper: Blur Alpha
Fields.Description: Opacity control for sniper scope blur overlay, blending depth of field with scoped vision effects.

Fields.Name: Sniper: Blur Begin
Fields.Description: Depth threshold where sniper blur effect begins to activate, typically near scope zoom transitions.

Fields.Name: Sniper: Blur End
Fields.Description: Depth threshold where sniper blur reaches full intensity, fully simulating scoped optical defocus.

Fields.Name: Motion Blur Intensity
Fields.Description: Overall strength of motion blur effect applied to moving objects and camera motion.

Fields.Name: Shutter Speed
Fields.Description: Simulated exposure time affecting motion blur length; slower shutter speeds produce stronger motion streaking.

Fields.Name: Solve Single Step
Fields.Description: Forces lens simulation to be evaluated in a single computation pass, improving determinism at potential cost of quality.

Fields.Name: Depth of Field Alpha
Fields.Description: Global blending factor for depth of field effect, controlling overall strength of blur applied based on focus distance.
